args: set -euo pipefail; pkill -f '/Users/deepsaint/Desktop/megaserver/examples/hello-service/server.py' || true; rm -rf tmp/megahome2 /tmp/megaserver.fzy.plan.input.json /tmp/megaserver.fzy.plan.output.json; cd rust; cargo run --quiet -- --home ../tmp/megahome2 init >/dev/null; cargo run --quiet -- --home ../tmp/megahome2 deploy ../examples/hello-service >/dev/null; cargo run --quiet -- --home ../tmp/megahome2 services | grep -q 'hello-service'; cargo run --quiet -- --home ../tmp/megahome2 secrets set hello-service API_KEY s3cr3t >/dev/null; cargo run --quiet -- --home ../tmp/megahome2 secrets list --service hello-service | grep -q 'API_KEY'; cargo run --quiet -- --home ../tmp/megahome2 expose hello-service edge.local --port 18080 >/dev/null; cargo run --quiet -- --home ../tmp/megahome2 route list --service hello-service | grep -q 'edge.local'; cargo run --quiet -- --home ../tmp/megahome2 volumes list | grep -q 'hello-data'; cargo run --quiet -- --home ../tmp/megahome2 shell hello-service python3 -c 'import os; assert os.environ["API_KEY"] == "s3cr3t"; assert os.environ["MEGASERVER_SERVICE"] == "hello-service"'; snap=$(cargo run --quiet -- --home ../tmp/megahome2 snapshot hello-service | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin)["snapshot"])'); cargo run --quiet -- --home ../tmp/megahome2 stop hello-service >/dev/null; cargo run --quiet -- --home ../tmp/megahome2 rollback hello-service "$snap" >/dev/null; cargo run --quiet -- --home ../tmp/megahome2 inspect hello-service | grep -q '"status": "healthy"'; cargo run --quiet -- --home ../tmp/megahome2 destroy hello-service >/dev/null
